subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast hearkened unto the wise Remembrance! The fire of Sinai hath been kindled in Paran of praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من استمع للذکر الحکیم قد فاز نار السینا فی فاران الثناء
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @being a source of light; guidance
